questions.question: What is source of truth?
questions.answer: Organ-owned contracts/schemas and taskpack-required report artifacts in this repository.

questions.question: What evidence level proves behavior?
questions.answer: E1-E3: files created, parse checks executed, receipts written.

questions.question: What cap applies if evidence missing?
questions.answer: At minimum WARN with fake-green prevention; clean PASS blocked.

questions.question: What would make claim fake-green?
questions.answer: Claiming clean PASS while global caps remain or without validation receipts.
